roa.docketEntryComment: Order for Reduction of Charge(s) PC 17(b) and Dismissal PC 1203.4
DEFT'S PETN/MOTN REDUCE CHRG, TERMI PROBTN, DISM FILED

/CAL: DEFENDANT'SPC 17(B), PC 1203,3 AND PC1203,4 MOTIONS/X: THE COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) AS TO THE SOLE COUNT, PC 601(A)2,/CTORD: CHARGE (S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR//X: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,3 IS GRANTED,/CTORD: PROBATION IN #2515929 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/X: MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4 IS ALSO GRANTED BY THE COURT,/X: PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTYPLEA IS ENTERED,/X: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM MARIN  COUNTY TO SANFRANCISCO COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM MARIN COUNTYTO SAN FRANCISCOCOUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/PROB EXP: 05-15-23/
